title: terminalia engleri
intro: Terminalia engleri, also known as Engler's terminalia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Combretaceae. The plant is traditionally used in African and Asian folk medicine, and its medicinal properties are attributed to its rich content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids. The health benefits of Terminalia engleri include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of fever, diarrhea, and respiratory infections. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its extracts are also used to develop various herbal preparations, including capsules and tablets, that are used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
